description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a series of interconnected rectangular volumes and flat surfaces. The structure is predominantly composed of dark gray materials, with a prominent brown section that appears to represent a wooden deck or patio area. Several small, blue-tinted window-like elements are distributed across the facade, adding visual interest and suggesting interior spaces. The roof is entirely flat, consistent with contemporary architectural styles, and the overall form is low and elongated. The house lacks visible ornamentation, focusing instead on clean lines and functional forms. The entryway is subtly integrated, with no prominent porch or steps, emphasizing minimalism.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with geometric, interconnected volumes and a brown deck area. Blue-tinted windows and a minimalist entryway highlight its contemporary style.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with a large brown deck area and several blue-tinted window elements.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the elongated structure and the depth of the brown deck, with fewer visible windows.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the full span of the brown deck and the symmetrical arrangement of the house's volumes.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the house's layered geometry and the integration of the deck with the main structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway with no visible porch or steps, integrated into the main facade
